title: Pagination
description: Configurable multi-page text displays for servers
body:
Pagination is a server-side mod that allows you to define "Pages" in a config file that will be sent to a player upon a defined command.

/pagination - Main command. Does nothing on its own.

/pagination [ALIAS] - Replace [ALIAS] with your defined alias from config and it will send that Page to you.

You can use color codes.

![Preview of how Pagination looks ingame (supports color codes)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cd559f9aa453ffae5d9663da19ef24ae22b6804.png)
